submissions.notes: BEST. Full classification. TTA. conf=0.05. 26s runtime.
REGRESSION. DINOv2 classification worse than YOLO nc=356. 279s runtime (nearly timed out). Lesson: don't replace YOLO classifier with prototype matching.

key_learnings.yolo_nc356_is_better_classifier: YOLOv8 nc=356 trained end-to-end is a better classifier than DINOv2 prototype matching on this dataset
key_learnings.dinov2_as_supplement_not_replacement: Use DINOv2 to ENHANCE nc=356 predictions, not replace them
key_learnings.runtime_matters: Tiled inference at imgsz=1024 + DINOv2 = 279s, dangerously close to 300s limit
key_learnings.v2_is_baseline_to_beat: v2 (YOLOv8m nc=356 + TTA + conf=0.05) at 0.7413 is our best

next_strategy.approach: Use YOLOv8l nc=356 (better model) + nc=356 class prior + optional DINOv2 fallback for rare classes only

models_training.vm1: DINOv2 linear head (for rare class fallback)
models_training.vm2: YOLOv8l nc=356 v2 (resume from best checkpoint)
